overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic urban checkpoint, past distinctive purple charging stations where a surveillance drone flies by, and down a commercial boulevard lined with palm trees and digital billboards toward a crowd of pedestrians.

agents.ego_description: moving through the security checkpoint past the guard

notable_agents.action: NCPD officer standing guard at the checkpoint holding a device

red and white striped construction barriers with NCPD branding
small checkpoint structure with yellow railing

segments.scene_description: The clip opens at a security checkpoint where an NCPD officer stands guard. The camera moves past the officer through red and white striped barriers, transitioning from the enclosed checkpoint area into the open street beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with futuristic charging stations

events.description: black sedan drives past on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking down the street approaching the purple charging kiosks

sleek black car with silver rims
building facade with large red and white abstract mural

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into a medium-width street featuring distinctive purple charging kiosks at the center. A black sedan passes by on the right as the camera approaches the kiosks, with the checkpoint barriers now receding to the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: street with surveillance drone and approaching commercial district

events.description: black spherical surveillance drone flies past the camera at close range

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street as a drone passes by closely

entered.detail: black spherical drone with camera and propellers
tall palm trees lining the street
large illuminated advertising screens on building facades
group of people walking in the distance

segments.scene_description: As the camera passes the purple kiosks, a black surveillance drone suddenly flies past at close range. The scene opens up to reveal palm trees and digital billboards in the distance, with a crowd of pedestrians becoming visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial boulevard with digital signage and pedestrians

events.description: entering the open commercial area with visible crowd and palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking down the commercial boulevard toward the crowd of pedestrians

entered.detail: large orange industrial container on the sidewalk
scattered debris and cardboard on the ground

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a wide commercial boulevard lined with palm trees and massive digital billboards. The crowd of pedestrians grows closer and more distinct as the camera advances, passing an orange dumpster and construction barriers that continue along the left side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a restrictive security checkpoint into a sprawling, neon-lit commercial boulevard. It begins by passing an NCPD officer and moving through red and white striped barriers, transitioning from the enclosed checkpoint into the open street. As the camera advances, the environment shifts to a medium-width road featuring purple charging kiosks and a passing black sedan, with the initial barriers receding into the distance. The scene then opens further as a black surveillance drone flies past at close range, revealing a vista of palm trees and digital billboards. Finally, the camera enters a wide boulevard, passing an orange dumpster and construction barriers while moving toward a growing crowd of pedestrians under the glow of massive screens.
